home.title: SuperFan World Cup 2026 - Independent Guide
home.description: The most complete Spanish-language guide to the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Mexico, the United States, and Canada. Host cities, stadiums, teams, flights, and accommodation.
home.heading: Your independent guide to the 2026 World Cup
home.subheading: Everything you need to experience the World Cup in Mexico, the United States, and Canada
home.countdownLabel: Until the World Cup kicks off
home.whyText: We are the most complete independent Spanish-language guide for the 2026 World Cup. Verified information, practical advice, and optimized content to help you plan your World Cup experience.

footer.disclaimer: This site is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to FIFA or any official World Cup organizing body.
footer.copyright: SuperFan World Cup 2026. All rights reserved.

tools.budgetDescription: Calculate how much you need to attend the 2026 World Cup. Enter your origin city, destination, days, hotel tier, and meal budget.
tools.budgetSubheading: Estimate the total cost of your trip to the 2026 World Cup
tools.disclaimer: Estimates based on 2025-2026 averages. Actual prices may vary.
tools.mapDescription: Interactive map of all 16 World Cup 2026 host cities and stadiums across Mexico, the United States, and Canada.
tools.mapSubheading: Explore all 16 host cities and stadiums for the 2026 World Cup
tools.itineraryDescription: Build your personalized World Cup 2026 itinerary. Select matches, cities, and dates for a day-by-day plan with hotels, transport, and attractions.
tools.itinerarySubheading: Design your perfect World Cup 2026 trip city by city
tools.itineraryNoCities: Select at least one city to continue.
tools.currencyDescription: Convert between MXN, USD, CAD, EUR, GBP, BRL, ARS, and COP. Quick reference exchange rates to plan your budget across all 3 World Cup host countries.
tools.currencySubheading: Convert between the 3 host country currencies and more
tools.currencyDisclaimer: Reference rates. May vary at time of transaction.
tools.currencyQuickRef: Quick reference: $100 USD in each host country
tools.packingDescription: Generate your personalized packing list for the 2026 World Cup based on your destination city, activities, and travel dates. Printable and saveable.
tools.packingSubheading: Your personalized World Cup packing list by destination and activities
tools.toolsIndexDescription: Budget calculator, interactive map, trip itinerary planner, currency converter, and packing list generator. Everything you need to plan your World Cup trip.
tools.toolsIndexSubheading: Everything you need to plan your trip to the 2026 World Cup
tools.toolsIndexBudgetDesc: Estimate the total cost of your trip by city, days, hotel tier, and meals.
